title: Smart Seeds
description:
Makes plant items automatically convert to their block form.
This allows for automatic farming in a vanilla friendly way.
body:
## Description:
This modification causes plant-related items, such as seeds and saplings, to automatically plant themselves when they are in a valid position. This allows for automatic farming in a vanilla-friendly way.
<details>
<summary>Included Items</summary>
  
 **Farmland:** Wheat, Potatoes, Carrots, Pumpkins, Melons, Beetroot, Sweet Berries, Torchflower, Pitcher Pod\
  **Dirt:** Saplings, (Flowering) Azalea, Mangrove Propagule  
  **Other:** Nether Warts, Chorus Flower, Cocoa Beans  
</details>

![Dropped seeds on farmland converting to wheat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e32fcd0daec2e1282c2863ae4899b82de625976c.gif)
![Dropped azalea converting to block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8bc19bac3c47b25318dfab599997704be7b98e3d.gif)


## Settings:
- Time it takes for an item to be converted into a block.
- Whether affected items should be prevented from moving when in a valid position.
- Add and remove items.
 
**More details can be found in the readme.txt file contained within the datapack.**
